description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a prominent vertical facade element above the main entrance. The exterior is clad in horizontal siding with a gradient of warm beige and orange tones, complemented by a stone base trim. Large rectangular windows are present on the front and one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is a double door with a dark finish, flanked by a small overhang and stonework. The rear and one side of the house are more utilitarian, with minimal windows and a secondary door, as well as two orange bollards for protection. The overall structure is compact and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood or mixed-use area.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with warm beige and orange siding, stone trim, large front windows, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with double doors, large windows, and a vertical facade element above the door.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a secondary door, two orange bollards, and additional windows, with the stone base trim visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wall with horizontal siding and stone trim, lacking windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a continuous stretch of siding and stone trim, with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent double door with a vertical facade element, stone trim, and a small overhang.
